name: Orange and Onion Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Cup olive oil or salad oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel oranges; remove the white membrane using a sharp knife.
2. Cut oranges and onion into thin slices. Place in a shallow dish.
3. In a measuring cup, combine olive oil, vinegar, 2 tablespoons water, garlic, pepper, and salt. Stir well with a fork.
4. Pour the dressing over oranges and onion. Refrigerate, covered, until well chilled, at least 2 hours.
5. Remove garlic from serving. Place greens and olives in a bowl. Add oranges and onion (separate into rings). Add dressing to taste. Toss and serve.
